languages.original_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

languages.text: "Любопытно, что ты чувствуешь некую боль, которой не ощущаю я. Движущая Сила внутри моих гальванических цепей течет плавно и покойно. Возможно, ты видишь нечто, что недоступно моему восприятию, друкари".

"It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."
languages.original_text: "Любопытно, что ты чувствуешь некую боль, которой не ощущаю я. Движущая Сила внутри моих гальванических цепей течет плавно и покойно. Возможно, ты видишь нечто, что недоступно моему восприятию, друкари".

traits.locale_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

"It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

"It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

languages.text: «Es curioso que percibas un dolor que no siento. La Fuerza Motriz fluye de forma continuada y serena por mis circuitos galvánicos. Tal vez estés buscando algo fuera de los límites de mi percepción, Drukhari».
languages.original_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

traits.locale_text: «Es curioso que percibas un dolor que no siento. La Fuerza Motriz fluye de forma continuada y serena por mis circuitos galvánicos. Tal vez estés buscando algo fuera de los límites de mi percepción, Drukhari».

languages.text: 「あなたが、私の感じていない痛みを感じ取るとは、興味深いですね。モーティヴ・フォースは、私のガルヴァニック回路を滑らかに、静かに流れています。おそらくあなたは、私の知覚の及ばぬ何かを見ているのでしょう、ドルカリよ」
languages.original_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが、私の感じていない痛みを感じ取るとは、興味深いですね。モーティヴ・フォースは、私のガルヴァニック回路を滑らかに、静かに流れています。おそらくあなたは、私の知覚の及ばぬ何かを見ているのでしょう、ドルカリよ」

languages.text: “有意思，你感觉到了我自己都未曾感知到的痛苦。源力正平稳宁静地流过我的原电回路。或许你看到了某些超出我感知的东西，黑暗灵族。”
languages.original_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

traits.locale_text: “有意思，你感觉到了我自己都未曾感知到的痛苦。源力正平稳宁静地流过我的原电回路。或许你看到了某些超出我感知的东西，黑暗灵族。”

languages.text: "Es ist seltsam, dass Ihr einen Schmerz verspürt, den ich nicht fühle. Die Antriebskraft fließt langsam und friedvoll durch meinen galvanischen Kreislauf. Vielleicht seht Ihr etwas außerhalb meiner Wahrnehmung, Drukhari."
languages.original_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist seltsam, dass Ihr einen Schmerz verspürt, den ich nicht fühle. Die Antriebskraft fließt langsam und friedvoll durch meinen galvanischen Kreislauf. Vielleicht seht Ihr etwas außerhalb meiner Wahrnehmung, Drukhari."

languages.text: « Il est curieux que vous perceviez une douleur que je n'éprouve pas. La Force Motrice se meut sereinement et sans heurts à travers mes circuits galvaniques. Vous sentez peut-être quelque chose qui échappe à ma perception, Drukhari. »
languages.original_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

traits.locale_text: « Il est curieux que vous perceviez une douleur que je n'éprouve pas. La Force Motrice se meut sereinement et sans heurts à travers mes circuits galvaniques. Vous sentez peut-être quelque chose qui échappe à ma perception, Drukhari. »

languages.text: "Benim hissetmediğim bir acıyı hissetmen ilginç. Devinim Gücü, galvaniz devrelerimden pürüzsüz ve sakince akıyor. Belki de benim algımın ulaşamadığı bir şeyi görüyorsundur Drukhari."
languages.original_text: "It is curious that you sense pain that I do not feel. The Motive Force is flowing smoothly and serenely through my galvanic circuits. Perhaps you are seeing something beyond the reach of my perception, Drukhari."

traits.locale_text: "Benim hissetmediğim bir acıyı hissetmen ilginç. Devinim Gücü, galvaniz devrelerimden pürüzsüz ve sakince akıyor. Belki de benim algımın ulaşamadığı bir şeyi görüyorsundur Drukhari."
